bookSourceComment:
本书源修改自关耳010225
现在能看的VIP章节url的versionCode最大是381

‼️一定要点一次登录右上角的✓，确保登陆头里有versionCode的参数

ruleBookInfo.author: $.authorName
ruleBookInfo.intro:
novelId = java.getString("$.novelId"); novelTags = String(java.getString("$.novelTags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|,(?=\S)/g, "🏷️"); mainview = java.getString("$.mainview"); protagonist = java.getString("$.protagonist"); costar = java.getString("$.costar"); other = java.getString("$.other"); novelIntroShort = java.getString("$.novelIntroShort"); littleintro = String(java.getString("$.novelIntro")); littleintro = littleintro.replace(/立意\:/, "立意："); littleintro = /立意：/.test(littleintro) ? littleintro.replace(/.*(立意：.*)/, "$1") : ""; comment_count = String(java.getString("$.comment_count")).replace(/\D/, ""); novelbefavoritedcount = java.getString("$.novelbefavoritedcount"); nutrition_novel = java.getString("$.nutrition_novel"); novelIntro = String(java.getString("$.novelIntro")).replace(/立意\:.*$/, ""); OtherInfoUrl = "http://app.jjwxc.org/androidapi/getnovelOtherInfo?novelId=" + novelId + "&type=novelbasicinfo&versionCode=" + Map("versionCode"); B = JSON.parse(java.ajax(OtherInfoUrl)); // 完结评分 novelreview = B.novelreview; novelreview = novelreview.match(/\d分/) ? novelreview : ""; // 抽奖 novelidPrizeTitle = B.novelidPrize.data.novelidPrizeTitle; novelidPrizeCondition = B.novelidPrize.data.novelidPrizeCondition headcount = B.novelidPrize.data.headcount; prize = B.novelidPrize.data.prize; reasonfordraw = B.novelidPrize.data.reasonfordraw; novelidPrize = "" + novelidPrizeTitle + "
" + reasonfordraw + "
" + novelidPrizeCondition + "　" + headcount + "　" + prize + ""; novelidPrize = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(novelidPrizeTitle) ? novelidPrize + "
‎" : ""; // 请假条 leaveDateBack = B.novelLeave.leaveDateBack; leaveContent = B.novelLeave.leaveContent; leaveDate = B.novelLeave.leaveDate; novelLeave = "" + leaveDateBack + "
" + leaveContent + "
" + leaveDate + ""; novelLeave = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(leaveDateBack) ? novelLeave + "
‎" : ""; INTRO = `

${novelLeave}

${novelidPrize}

标签：${novelTags}

一句话简介：${novelIntroShort}

视角：${mainview}

主角：${protagonist.replace("主角：", "").trim()}

配角：${costar.replace("配角：", "").trim()}

其它：${other.replace("其它：", "").trim()}

立意：${littleintro.replace("立意：", "").trim()}

评论：${comment_count}

收藏：${novelbefavoritedcount}

灌溉：${nutrition_novel}

评分：${novelreview}


作品简介

${novelIntro.replace(/\n/g, "
")}

` ##\\\s|\\[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2,}：\\\s
ruleBookInfo.name: $.novelName

ruleContent.content:
function decode() { let response = java.get(baseUrl, {}); let content = String(response.body()); isPay = !/"content"/.test(content); if (isPay) { let accesskey = String(response.header("accesskey")); let keyString = String(response.header("keystring")); let accesskeyLen = accesskey.length; let v6 = accesskey.charCodeAt(accesskeyLen - 1); let v9 = 0; for (var i = 0; i < accesskey.length; i++) { v9 += accesskey.charCodeAt(i) } let v15 = v9 % keyString.length; let v17 = Math.floor(v9 / 65); let v18 = keyString.length; let v43 = keyString.substring(v15, v17 + v15 > v18 ? v18 : v17 + v15); let v32 = content.length; let [v38, dest] = (v6 & 1) !== 0 ? [content.slice(-12), content.slice(0, -12)] : [content.slice(0, 12), content.slice(12)]; let key = java.md5Encode(v43 + v38).slice(0, 8); let iv = java.md5Encode(v38).slice(0, 8); content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(dest) } return content } extend = book.getVariable("custom"); if (!/versionCode/.test(baseUrl)) { content = java.getString("$.content"); upDown = java.getString("$.upDown"); saybody = java.getString("$.sayBody"); message = java.getString("$.message"); } else { if (/content/.test(result)) { java.setContent(result); } else { java.setContent(decode()); } content = java.getString("$..content"); if (String(content).length > 30) { content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", "KW8Dvm2N", "1ae2c94b").decryptStr(content); } else { content = ""; } upDown = java.getString("$..upDown"); saybody = java.getString("$..sayBody"); message = java.getString("$..message"); buy_ratio = java.getString("$..buy_ratio"); reader_buy_ratio = java.getString("$..reader_buy_ratio"); }; chapterintro = java.get("chapterintro"); pointMeassge = java.get("pointmeassge"); content1 = `\t${chapterintro}\n${message}`; if (pointMeassge != "0晋江币") { content1 += "\n价格：" + pointMeassge + "（APP专享价）"; } if (/免费赠送的福利番外/.test(message)) { content1 += "\n本福利番外赠送给正文订阅率达到" + buy_ratio + "的读者\n您截止至上一章的正文订阅率：" + reader_buy_ratio; } content = content != "" ? String(content).replace(/

|\n\n/g,"
‎
") : ""; saybody = replaceEmoticons(String(saybody)).replace(/src="(.*?)"/g,'src="$1,{"style":"TEXT"}"'); saybody = saybody != "" && (extend.includes("开启作话") || Map("saybodySwitch") !== "关闭作话") ? `\t▍作者有话说：\n${saybody}` : ""; Content = content == "" ? content1 : (upDown == "0" ? `${saybody}\n‎\n${content}` : `${content}\n${saybody}`);
ruleContent.replaceRegex:
<js>
let bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
let isParagraphEnabled = Map("paragraphSwitch");

let globalLimit = Map("paragraphLimit") || "20";
let globalSort = Map("paragraphSort") || "0";
let versionCode = Map("versionCode");

if (!isParagraphEnabled && /开启.?段评/.test(bbb)) {
	bbb = bbb.replace(/开启.?段评/g, '').trim();
	book.putCustomVariable(bbb);
	java.toast("⚠️ 全局段评已关闭，已清除本书的段评开启标记");
}

try {
	if (!/关闭本书段评/.test(bbb)) {
		let shouldShowParagraph = false;
		if (isParagraphEnabled || /开启.?段评/.test(bbb)) {
			shouldShowParagraph = true;
			if (!/开启•段评/.test(bbb)) {
				baseUrl = bDe(baseUrl);
				cid = baseUrl.match(/chapterId=(\d+)/)[1];
				nid = baseUrl.match(/novelId=(\d+)/)[1];

				let checkurl = `https://android.jjwxc.com/app.jjwxc/android/reading/authorNovelSetting/getSetting?versionCode=${versionCode}&novelid=${nid}&setting_type=author_paragraph_comment_switch,{"headers":{"versionCode":"${versionCode}"}}`;
				let checkparagraph = JSON.parse(java.ajax(checkurl))?.data?.paragraph_switch;

				if (checkparagraph === "1") {
					book.putCustomVariable(/开启段评/.test(bbb) ? bbb.replace(/开启段评/, "开启•段评") : bbb + "\n开启•段评");
					java.toast("本书作者已开启段评功能");
				} else if (checkparagraph === "0") {
					book.putCustomVariable(/开启段评/.test(bbb) ? bbb.replace(/开启段评/, "关闭本书段评") : bbb + "\n关闭本书段评");
					java.toast("本书作者没有开启段评功能，已自动在【书籍变量】中关闭段评");
					shouldShowParagraph = false;
				}
			}

			if (shouldShowParagraph) {
				baseUrl = bDe(baseUrl);
				cid = baseUrl.match(/chapterId=(\d+)/)[1];
				nid = baseUrl.match(/novelId=(\d+)/)[1];
				let getNovelParagraph = `https://android.jjwxc.com/app.jjwxc/android/reading/comment/getNovelParagraphCommentNum?versionCode=${versionCode}&novelid=${nid}&token=${Map("token")}&chapterid=${cid}&limit=${globalLimit}&sort=${globalSort},{"headers":{"versionCode":"${versionCode}"}}`;

				let $ = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getNovelParagraph));
				let datalength = $.data.length;

				if (datalength) {
					let pid = 1;
					let jsonData = $.data;
					let list = result.split("\n");
					let processedList = "";

					for (i in list) {
						let item = list[i];
						if (/^[\s　]*[\u200B-\u200F\u202A-\u202E\uFEFF]?[\s　]*$/.test(item) || /^\s*$/.test(item)) {
							processedList += "\n" + item + "\n";
						} else {
							let matchedPara = jsonData.find(p => p.paragraph_id === String(pid) || (String(p.paragraph_id) === "-2" && /作者有话说/.test(item)));
							if (matchedPara) {
								processedList += `${item}${getImage(matchedPara.comment_total,matchedPara.paragraph_id)}\n`;
							} else {
								processedList += item + "\n";
							}
							pid++;
						}
					}
					result = processedList;
				}
			}
		}
	}
} catch (e) {
	java.log("段评处理错误: " + e);
}
result
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.authorName||$.authorname
ruleExplore.intro:
<js>
intro2 = java.getString("$.novelIntroShort||$.novelintroshort");
tags = String(java.getString("$.tags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|[,]/g,"🏷️");
remarks = java.getString("$.remarks");
remarks = remarks == "" ? "" : "　📝备注：" + remarks;
intro = intro2 + remarks + "\n‎\n" + tags;
</js>
ruleExplore.name: $.novelName||$.novelname

ruleSearch.author: $.authorname
ruleSearch.intro:
<js>
intro2 = java.getString("$.novelintroshort");
tags = String(java.getString("$.tags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|\s/g,"🏷️");
intro = intro2 + "\n‎\n" + tags;
</js>
ruleSearch.name: $.novelname

ruleToc.chapterName:
<js>
name = java.getString("$.chaptername");
chaptertype = java.getString("$.chaptertype");
pointMeassge = java.getString("$.pointMeassge");
chapterMessage = java.getString("$.chapterMessage") == "福利番外" ? "🧧[福利番外]" : "";
java.put("pointmeassge", pointMeassge);
chapterid = java.getString("$.chapterid");
islock = +java.getString("$.islock") ? "🔒[锁]" : "";
isvip = +java.getString("$.isvip") ? "💸" : "";
if (chaptertype == "0") {
	chaptername = String(name).replace(/[【]?第\s?\d+\s?章[】]?\s*|[第]?[〇零一二三四五六七八九十百千万两□]+章\s*|(?=^)\d+(?=$)|福利番外/g, "");
	chaptername = `${isvip}第${chapterid}章 ${chaptername}${chaptername == "" ? chapterMessage : " " + chapterMessage}${chaptername == "" ? islock : " " + islock}`;
} else {
	volumename = `📜${name}`;
}
</js>
ruleToc.chapterUrl:
<js>
token = Map("token");
novelid = java.getString("$.novelid");
chapterid = java.getString("$.chapterid");
isvip = java.getString("$.isvip");
chaptertype = java.getString("$.chaptertype");
if (isvip == "0") {
	url = "https://app-cdn.jjwxc.com/androidapi/chapterContent?novelId=" + novelid + "&chapterId=" + chapterid;
} else {
	url = "https://app-cdn.jjwxc.com/androidapi/chapterContent?novelId=" + novelid + "&versionCode=381&token=" + token + "&chapterId=" + chapterid;
};
chapterUrl = chaptertype == "0" ? url : "";
</js>

variableComment: 在登录里设置了关闭作话之后，在【书籍变量】里填写“开启作话”可以单独开启本书作者有话说

bookSourceComment: 在【正文页面】点击定制按钮可以加入书架 在【登录】输入token即可登陆查看收藏的作者； 目录 更新时间（不用的代码）：[-](?=[一-龥]) 正文：A = ''+" "+novelTags+" "+mainview+" "+protagonist+" "+costar+" "+other+" "+novelIntroShort+" "+novelIntro1+" "+commentcount+" "+novelbefavoritedcount+" ‎ "+novelIntro+" ‎ "+"【"+novelId+"】"+" "+"【"+codeUrl+"】"

ruleBookInfo.author: span[itemprop='name']@text
ruleBookInfo.name: td[height='40']@span.volumnfont@b@text

ruleContent.content:
<js>
islock = java.getString("$.islock");
if(islock == "0") {
	novelStep = java.getString("$.novelStep");
	novelStatus = novelStep == "0" ? "暂停" : (novelStep == "1" ? "连载" : "完结");
	novelClass = java.getString("$.novelClass");
	novelTags = String(java.getString("$.novelTags")).replace(/^(?=\S)|,(?=\S)/g,"🏷️");
	mainview = "视角："+java.getString("$.mainview");
	protagonist = String(java.getString("$.protagonist"));
	costar = String(java.getString("$.costar"));
	other= String(java.getString("$.other"));
	novelIntroShort = "一句话简介："+java.getString("$.novelIntroShort");
	littleintro = String(java.getString("$.novelIntro"));
	littleintro = littleintro.replace(/立意\:/,"立意：");
	littleintro = /立意：/.test(littleintro) ? littleintro.replace(/.*(立意：.*)/,"$1") : "";
	comment_count = "评论："+String(java.getString("$.comment_count")).replace(/\,/g,"");
	novelbefavoritedcount = "收藏："+java.getString("$.novelbefavoritedcount");
	nutrition_novel = "灌溉："+java.getString("$.nutrition_novel");
	novelIntro = String(java.getString("$.novelIntro")).replace(/立意\:.*$/,"");
	novelId = String(java.getString("$.novelId"));
	A =  novelClass+"　"+novelStatus+"\n"+novelTags+"\n"+mainview+"\n"+protagonist+"\n"+costar+"\n"+other+"\n"+novelIntroShort+"\n"+littleintro+"\n"+comment_count+"\n"+novelbefavoritedcount+"\n"+nutrition_novel+"\n‎\n"+novelIntro;
	} else {
	message = java.getString("$.message");
	}
</js>

ruleExplore.intro:
<js>
renew = java.getString("$.renew.novelName");
renewdate = java.getString("$.renew.renewdate");
favorite = java.getString("$.favorite.novelName");
favoriteEnd = java.getString("$.favoriteEnd.novelName");

`最新更新：《${renew}》　${renewdate}\n最热小说：《${favorite}》\n完结佳作：《${favoriteEnd}》`;
</js>
##\s?.{4}：《》
ruleExplore.kind:
<js>
authorSign = java.getString("$.authorSign");
signStatus = authorSign == 0 ? "未签约作者" : "签约作者";

favoriteNum = java.getString("$.favoriteNum");
multiplescore = java.getString("$.multiplescore");

let a1 = `被收藏数：${favoriteNum}`;
let a2 = multiplescore != "" ? `, 总积分：${multiplescore}` : "";

`${a1}${a2}, ${signStatus}`;
</js>
ruleExplore.name: $.authorName
